context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the phoenix-auth-customization instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when extending `phx.gen.auth` with custom fields.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Never modify generated auth migrations** — create separate migrations for custom fields

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Update both the registration form AND the `save/2` handler** — the form must send the field

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `unique_constraint` + database unique index for uniqueness** — never validate in application code alone
